sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55178" key="katasko/pion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατασκόπ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n55178.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">look-out ship</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.25</biblScope> </bibl> (sed leg. -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκοπικόν</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
